title: Senior Property Tax Exemption Expansion -- 65% Exemption, $58,399 Income Cap
summary: Assessment staff presents item 28: expanding the senior property tax exemption program to 65% of assessed value with income eligibility up to $58,399. Staff notes agreement with Councilor Jones-Rowser on the approach. Brief discussion confirms readiness for introduction and vote.
raw_content:

processing_notes: Continues senior exemption discussion from Feb 18 and Feb 23 study sessions. $54,999.99 was initially stated but corrected to $58,399 during discussion. Amends General Ordinance #20-2023.
Segment 9 of 14 from Common Council Study Session, Wednesday March 4th 2026
Transcript corrections applied: SU -> Syracuse University
